items.description: Path to an existing plan@1 markdown (docs/plans/PLAN-<slug>-<YYYYMMDD>/plan.md) to audit.

rubric_version.description: Override rubric version. Defaults to the skill's declared version; an unknown version is needs_human, never guessed.

upstream_context.description: The plan-author output envelope, when chained (gate_outcome, scan_ref, memory_rows for cross-checks).

trace_id.description: UUID for genie.action_log correlation. Auto-generated if absent.
